text:
P0200C_FLR_MAT_ALARM_IND P0200C Floor Mat Alarm CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates how often a floor mat alarm was used to monitor resident movement and alert
staff. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not used
1=Used less than daily
2=Used Daily effective 10/01/2017
698 P0200D_MTN_SENSOR_ALARM_IND P0200D_MTN_SENSOR_ALARM_IND P0200D Motion Sensor Alarm CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates how often a motion sensor alarm was used to monitor resident movement and
alert staff. -=Not
